title: String Dupe 99
description: This project aims to make assend string dupers to the godly plane, this simple datapack makes puting 1 string in a crafting table fill your inventory with string.
body:
This datapack is simple, place one string the middle of a crafting table and get 64, then place the 64 back in and your whole inventory is filled.

The datapack is super lightwieght and has 0 impact on preformance.
This datapack is also downloadable as a mod.
